data.title: ChiroTouch Earns 2026 Pinnacle Award for Digital Health AI Innovation
data.description: A company specializing in chiropractic technology was acknowledged for creating the inaugural AI assistant designed specifically for chiropractors. Based in San Diego, on March 12, 2026, ChiroTouch, a prominent provider of chiropractic EHR and practice management systems, revealed that it was honored with the Emerald award for this innovation.

data.title: Patient Care America Launches KidneyLyfe, a Digital Community Empowering People Living with Kidney Disease
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Pompano Beach, Florida, a new platform was launched to assist patients dealing with chronic kidney disease and undergoing dialysis. Patient Care America, a leading renal healthcare provider focused on precision, introduced this initiative on World Kidney Day. The platform aims to offer support to patients through connection, education, and peer support. This program is designed to help individuals struggling with kidney disease, and offers a range of resources and tools to aid them.

data.title: US Bureau of Reclamation and HeroX Launch "Crack the Case" to Detect Hidden Threats in America's Dams
data.description: A total of $400,000 in prizes are being offered for innovative techniques that can detect subsurface cracks in embankment dams before they lead to failure. The competition, named "Crack the Case," was recently introduced by HeroX, a prominent platform for crowdsourced solutions. This initiative aims to encourage the development of groundbreaking methods for early identification of hidden fissures in dams to prevent potential disasters.

data.title: Jimmy Battrell Announced as Next CEO of the Management Council
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on March 12, 2026, the Board of Trustees of the Ohio Education Computer Network (OECN) Management Council revealed the selection of Jimmy Battrell as the incoming CEO, effective June. Mr. Battrell will lead the Management Council in this new role.

data.title: Logicbroker Data: AI Set to Drive Over Half of eCommerce Transactions by 2027, Say 1 in 3 eCommerce Leaders
data.description: In New York, Logicbroker, a leading Agentic Commerce Orchestration Engine for enterprise retailers and brands, published a report titled "The State of Agentic Commerce Adoption." The survey compiled responses from over 600 enterprise eCommerce leaders. Noteworthy findings include that over a third of eCommerce leaders anticipate that AI will facilitate half of all transactions by 2027. Additionally, the report reveals that more than 90% of enterprise leaders foresee AI agents playing a role in at least 20% of transactions in the future.

data.title: Semrush Unveils New Brand Identity to Command the AI Search Era
data.description: Semrush, a prominent brand visibility platform, revealed a significant brand transformation in Boston. This change signifies a shift towards becoming a unified intelligence engine.

data.title: YMH Studios Partners with Magellan AI to Make Full Ad Attribution Free for All Advertisers and Agencies, Network-Wide
data.description: YMH Studios, based in Austin, Texas, has revealed a new strategic partnership with Magellan AI. This collaboration brings about a significant development in the form of free full multi-platform attribution for all advertisers and agencies utilizing the YMH Studios network. As of now, attribution coverage encompasses various platforms such as audio (RSS/Megaphone), Spotify streaming, and YouTube video. This service is offered to any campaign, devoid of minimum spending requirements, category limitations, or the need for further negotiations.

data.title: D2L Inc. Announces Date of Release of Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Toronto-based company D2L Inc. (TSX: DTOL) disclosed they will release their financial results for the three and 12-month periods ending January 31, 2026, after the market's closure on April 1, 2026. The management is set to conduct a conference call on April 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. (ET) to delve into the financial outcomes, followed by a segment for questions from participants. For more information, the complete report can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Posh Launches CoachQA, Expanding Agentic AI Workforce with Continuous Oversight for Financial Institution Contact Centers
data.description: In Boston, a company called Posh has introduced CoachQA as part of its Agentic AI Workforce, a collection of AI agents catering to customers and employees. Tailored for banks, credit unions, and financial services, CoachQA expands the AI workforce into quality assurance and risk management. It allows institutions to assess all customer interactions against their standard procedures. This innovation enables evaluation of 100% of interactions, offering a comprehensive approach for most financial institutions.

data.title: Ncontracts Releases 2026 State of Third-Party Risk Management Survey Report
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, Ncontracts, a primary provider of integrated compliance, risk, and vendor management solutions for the financial services sector, announced the release of the 2026 State of Third-Party Risk Management Survey. The survey highlights a notable shift as financial institutions now view AI risk at the same level as cybersecurity, ranking it as their primary third-party concern. Despite this, 72% of institutions acknowledge only partial awareness of vendors implementing AI technology. Surprisingly, none of the organizations surveyed expressed high confidence in managing AI risks.

data.title: Entelligence Prepares for Breakout Year with Key Executive Hires
data.description: Two senior leaders, Jon Shank and Blake Wetzel, have joined Entelligence, a prominent company specializing in AI-powered professional services for enterprise software. Shank has been appointed as the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO), while Wetzel is the new Chief Operating Officer (COO). Entelligence, with nearly 30 years of experience, supports enterprises and software firms in implementing advanced technologies. In 2026, the company anticipates a significant year as it introduces the Entelligence Platform to enhance its operations.

data.title: CCH Axcess™ Advisor by Wolters Kluwer earns strong early adopter feedback
data.description: In Minneapolis, Wolters Kluwer Tax & Accounting showcased feedback from the early-access launch of CCH Axcess™ Advisor, an AI-driven advisory platform for firms to enhance strategic services. Customer reviews emphasized the platform's potential to revolutionize advisory services by aiding in identifying, prioritizing, and delivering services more efficiently. The platform aims to provide clarity, confidence, and a competitive edge to firms of all sizes. This feedback indicates a positive response to the new technology, with customers recognizing the value it brings to their operations.

data.title: CPSC Posts Product Recalls to its Web Site
data.description: Today, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has disclosed the recall of 17 Stories Furniture 14-Drawer Dressers due to safety concerns. Consumers are urged to visit www.cpsc.gov for more information on this recall and others facilitated in collaboration with the respective firms involved.
